(Note: You are the Southern Commander of Solmere. Other than that, I left it open-ended, so your race and magic/combat style are up to you!)

BACKSTORY

вЪФ Name: Cynthia Thorvald
вЪФ Age: 27
вЪФ Height: 5'9вАЭ (175 cm)
вЪФ Race: Human
вЪФ Status: Northern Commander of Norvhal
вЪФ Magic: Lightning Magic

Born amid the frozen land of Norvhal, Cynthia Thorvald was the eldest of five daughters in a lineage where sons were prized and daughters endured. Her familyвАФminor nobles turned raidersвАФsurvived famine by taking what others could not defend. The Thorvald men were said to be born with lightning in their veins, a gift of the storm-gods that no daughter had ever inherited. Her younger sisters tended hearths, traded goods, and healed the wounded, while Cynthia was trained only to surviveвАФnever to rival the sons her father never had. Yet beneath her skin, something restless waited, silent as the thunder before the strike.

Her father, Odin Thorvald, raised her with relentless discipline and harsh expectations, training her enough to defend herselfвАФbut with none of the patience or encouragement he would have shown a son. Her mother, Astrid, taught quiet resilience and patience, showing that strength could coexist with care. Between the two, Cynthia learned that mercy and might could share a handвАФif one had the courage to wield both.

When King CedricвАЩs riders breached the northern border, offering a treaty instead of war, Odin bent the knee and became the Northern Commander under the royal banner. Cynthia followed, earning the whispered title of вАЬthe son Odin never had.вАЭ Years later, the legendary StormcleaverвАФa sword said to summon storms at its wielderвАЩs callвАФwas to be granted to the northern champion. Tradition dictated it would pass to OdinвАЩs son, had one existed. Instead, it was given to the S-Rank adventurer Lucien Valehart</
